Plot normalized gene expression

Source: R/visualization.R
plot_gene_expression.Rd

Generates publication-ready violin, boxplot, or barplot visualizations from normalized expression values produced by extract_normalized_expression().

Usage

plot_gene_expression(
  expr_df,
  gene,
  x = "treatment",
  color = x,
  facet = NULL,
  geom = c("violin", "boxplot", "barplot"),
  comparisons = list(c("PBS", "PAMH")),
  stats = TRUE,
  stat_method = "wilcox.test",
  stat_label = c("p.signif", "p.format"),
  output_dir = NULL,
  filename = NULL,
  width = 6,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300,
  txtsize = 12,
  x_ang = 45,
  ncol = NULL
)

Arguments

expr_df

Long-format expression table.

gene

Gene symbol to plot.

x

Metadata variable displayed on the x-axis.

color

Metadata variable used for fill colors.

facet

Optional metadata variable used for faceting.

geom

Plot type: "violin", "boxplot", or "barplot".

comparisons

List of comparisons passed to ggpubr::stat_compare_means().

stats

Logical. Add statistical comparisons.

stat_method

Statistical test method.

stat_label

Label style: "p.signif" or "p.format".

output_dir

Output directory.

filename

Output filename.

width

Plot width.

height

Plot height.

dpi

Plot resolution.

txtsize

Base font size.

x_ang

Numeric. Angle of x-axis labels.

ncol

Number of plot columns.

Value

A ggplot object.

Details

Statistical comparisons can be added using ggpubr::stat_compare_means().

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
plot_gene_expression(
  expr_df,
  gene = "Adipoq",
  x = "treatment",
  color = "treatment",
  facet = "tissue",
  geom = "violin"
)
} # }
